business_rule: Map known country and status variants to standard labels; use Unknown for unexpected values
Map yes/Y/true to true; no/N/false to false; otherwise unknown
Amounts below 50 are Low; 50 to 199.99 Medium; 200 to 499.99 High; 500 or more Premium
Paid and shipped or delivered orders are Healthy; failed payments are Payment Issue; cancelled or returned orders Need Review
Prices below 20 are Low; 20 to 99.99 Medium; 100 to 299.99 High; 300 or more Premium
Map yes/Y/true to true; no/N/false to false; otherwise unknown
Map channel spellings to Search, Social, Email, Display, Affiliate, or Unknown
Budgets below 1000 are Small; 1000 to 4999.99 Medium; 5000 or more Large
Revenue greater than cost is Profitable; equal is Break Even; zero revenue is No Revenue; otherwise Needs Review
Zero is No Conversions; 1 to 5 Low; 6 to 20 Medium; above 20 High
